---
title: "Gviz_HCC_RNAsample_Xist"
author: "MJY"
date: "2026-04-17"
output: html_document
---

################################################################################ 

# 

# OUTLINES:

# 1. Use Gviz to visualize BigWig signal tracks across genomic regions of interest.


# 

################################################################################ 

\#' \## <br> \#' 1. Use Gviz to visualize BigWig signal tracks across genomic regions of interest.


```{r}
rm(list = ls())

# Load required libraries
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(data.table))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(Gviz))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(RColorBrewer))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(TxDb.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm39.knownGene))

# Create GeneRegionTrack object from TxDb annotation
grt <- GeneRegionTrack(TxDb.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm39.knownGene)

# Set transcript annotation to gene symbols
grt@dp@pars$transcriptAnnotation <- "symbol"

# Optional: filter specific genes (currently commented out)
# grt_d <- data.frame(grt@range)
# rows_to_remove <- c("581911","581914","581916","581918")
# grt_d2 <- grt_d[!rownames(grt_d) %in% rows_to_remove, ]
# gr <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(grt_d2, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)
# grt <- GeneRegionTrack(gr, genome = "hg19", name = "Filtered Genes")

# Load gene annotation database
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)

# Extract Entrez IDs from GeneRegionTrack
entrez_ids <- mcols(grt@range)$gene

# Preview Entrez IDs
head(entrez_ids)

# Remove NA values
entrez_ids_clean <- entrez_ids[!is.na(entrez_ids)]

# Map Entrez IDs to gene symbols
entrez_to_symbol <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  org.Mm.eg.db,
  keys = unique(entrez_ids_clean),
  columns = "SYMBOL",
  keytype = "ENTREZID"
)

# Create mapping vector: EntrezID → SYMBOL
symbol_map <- setNames(entrez_to_symbol$SYMBOL, entrez_to_symbol$ENTREZID)

# Replace gene symbols in GeneRegionTrack
idx <- match(mcols(grt@range)$gene, names(symbol_map))
mcols(grt@range)$symbol <- symbol_map[idx]

# Check if replacement worked
head(mcols(grt@range)$symbol)

# Define genomic locus (can include multiple regions)
gloci <- data.frame(
  V1 = c("chrX"),
  V2 = c(102503000),
  V3 = c(102527500),
  V4 = c("-")
)

# Select the first region
gloci <- gloci[1,]

# Define labels for BigWig tracks
bwInfo <- data.frame(
  V2 = c("Con-Male-C57","Con-Male-PWK",
         "Con-Female-C57","Con-Female-PWK",
         "CCl4-Male-C57","CCl4-Male-PWK",
         "CCl4-Female-C57","CCl4-Female-PWK")
)

# Assign row names corresponding to file identifiers
rownames(bwInfo) <- c("5-F1-M-6W-Con-1.maternal.chr.RPKM","5-F1-M-6W-Con-1.paternal.chr.RPKM",
                      "2-F1-F-6W-Con-1-2_xist.bam.fa.C57.chr.sorted.genome.sorted.bam", 
                      "2-F1-F-6W-Con-1-2_xist.bam.fa.PWK.chr.sorted.genome.sorted.bam",
                      "4-F1-M-6W-CCl4-2.maternal.chr.RPKM", 
                      "4-F1-M-6W-CCl4-2.paternal.chr.RPKM",                      
                      "2-F1-F-6W-CCl4-1_xist.bam.fa.C57.chr.sorted.genome.sorted.bam", 
                      "2-F1-F-6W-CCl4-1_xist.bam.fa.PWK.chr.sorted.genome.sorted.bam")

# Adjustable parameter: scaling factor for genomic region display
genefold <- as.numeric("0")  # expand/shrink displayed region

# Define genomic range to plot
colnames(gloci) <- c("chr","start","end","strand")
chr <- gloci[rownames(gloci),]$chr
gloci$width <- with(gloci, end - start)

startpoint <- gloci[rownames(gloci),]$start - genefold * gloci[rownames(gloci),]$width
endpoint   <- gloci[rownames(gloci),]$end   + genefold * gloci[rownames(gloci),]$width

# Create a name for the plotted region
range_name <- paste0(chr, "_", round(startpoint), "_", round(endpoint))

# Initialize track list
tracklist <- list()

# Add ideogram track (chromosome overview)
itrack <- IdeogramTrack(genome = "mm39", chromosome = chr, outline = TRUE)
tracklist[["itrack"]] <- itrack

# Add scale bar track
scalebar <- GenomeAxisTrack(scale = 0.25, col = "black", fontcolor = "black",
                            name = "Scale", labelPos = "above", showTitle = TRUE)
tracklist[["scalebar"]] <- scalebar

# Add genomic axis track
axisTrack <- GenomeAxisTrack(labelPos = "above", col = "black", fontcolor = "black",
                             name = paste(chr, ":", sep = ""), exponent = 0, showTitle = TRUE)
tracklist[["axisTrack"]] <- axisTrack

# Define color palette
colpal <- rep(brewer.pal(12, "Paired"), 20)

# Define colors for each BigWig track
coldf <- data.frame(
  col = c("#2C7FB8", "#2C7FB8", 
          "#F28E2B", "#F28E2B",
          "#2C7FB8", "#2C7FB8",
          "#F28E2B", "#F28E2B"),
  row.names = rownames(bwInfo),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Define y-axis limits for each track
ylim_list <- list(
  "5-F1-M-6W-Con-1.maternal.chr.RPKM" = c(0, 70),
  "5-F1-M-6W-Con-1.paternal.chr.RPKM" = c(0, 70),
  "2-F1-F-6W-Con-1-2_xist.bam.fa.C57.chr.sorted.genome.sorted.bam" = c(0, 70),
  "2-F1-F-6W-Con-1-2_xist.bam.fa.PWK.chr.sorted.genome.sorted.bam" = c(0, 70),
  "4-F1-M-6W-CCl4-2.maternal.chr.RPKM" = c(0, 70),
  "4-F1-M-6W-CCl4-2.paternal.chr.RPKM" = c(0, 70),  
  "2-F1-F-6W-CCl4-1_xist.bam.fa.C57.chr.sorted.genome.sorted.bam" = c(0, 70),
  "2-F1-F-6W-CCl4-1_xist.bam.fa.PWK.chr.sorted.genome.sorted.bam" = c(0, 70)
)

# Add BigWig signal tracks
for(index in rownames(bwInfo)){
  bgFile <- file.path(
    "E:/Data/HCC/F1/RNAseq_xist/test",
    paste0(index, ".bw")
  )
  
  tracklist[[index]] <- DataTrack(
    range = bgFile,
    genome = "mm39",
    type = "histogram",
    name = chartr("_", "\n", bwInfo[index, ]),
    col.histogram = coldf[index, "col"],
    fill = coldf[index, "col"],
    ylim = ylim_list[[index]]
  )
  
  # Set y-axis tick marks
  displayPars(tracklist[[index]])$yTicksAt <- ylim_list[[index]]
}

# Optional: plot only Xist gene (currently commented out)
# gr_xist <- grt@range[mcols(grt@range)$symbol %in% "Xist"]
# grt_xist <- GeneRegionTrack(...)
# tracklist[["grt"]] <- grt_xist

# Customize GeneRegionTrack appearance
displayPars(grt)$fill <- "black"
displayPars(grt)$col <- "black"
displayPars(grt)$col.line <- "black"
displayPars(grt)$col.symbol <- "black"
displayPars(grt)$fontcolor.group <- "black"

tracklist[["grt"]] <- grt

# Plot tracks in current device
plotTracks(tracklist,
           from = startpoint,
           to = endpoint,
           chromosome = chr,
           background.panel = "transparent",
           background.title = "transparent",
           col.title = "black",
           col.axis = "black",
           rot.title = 0,
           cex.title = 0.5,
           margin = 50,
           title.width = 0.8,
           collapseTranscripts = "longest")  # collapse to longest transcript

# Export plot to PDF
# pdf_file <- paste0("E:/Data/HCC/F1/RNAseq_xist/test/", range_name, "_select_tsix_2.0.pdf")
# pdf(pdf_file, height = 6, width = 10)
# 
# plotTracks(tracklist,
#            from = startpoint,
#            to = endpoint,
#            chromosome = chr,
#            background.panel = "transparent",
#            background.title = "transparent",
#            col.title = "black",
#            col.axis = "black",
#            rot.title = 0,
#            cex.title = 0.75,
#            margin = 40,
#            title.width = 1.5,
#            collapseTranscripts = "longest",
#            transcriptAnnotation = "symbol")  # display gene symbols
# 
# dev.off()
```
